# Billing

## Extracted String Literals

```text
Billing Method
Currently, only prepaid resource packages are available for purchase.
The resource packages are categorized into three types based on “capabilities”: video generation package, image generation package, and virtual try-on package.
Prepaid Resource Packs
No credits will be deducted for failed tasks, regardless of the reason for failure, including failures due to content moderation policies
```
